info.title: OpenAPI 3.0
info.description: Provide access to API of 3xpl.com blockchain explorer

servers.description: Free sandbox server just for try
Production server to try your API key

tags.name: Blockchain
tags.description: general stats for blockchains or info about blocks, transactions and addresses

get.summary: stats for ecosystems, blockchains, or modules

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: ecosystem list, or blockchain list, or module list, comma-separated, or `all`, or `default` which is `all`

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: `greedy`, `non-greedy`, or `default` which is `non-greedy`; if `?from=` is provided with a list which is ambiguous in terms whether it's a blockchain or an ecosystem list, `greedy` will switch processing to ecosystems, while `non-greedy` will treat the list as a blockchain list

get.summary: search in all blockchains (blocks, transactions, addresses)

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: blockchain list, comma-separated, or `all`, or `default` which is `all`

parameters.name: in
parameters.description: entity list of (`block`, `transaction`, `address`), comma-separated, or `all`, or `default` which is `all`

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: data bits, comma-separated list of (`blocks`), at least `blocks` is required

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: module list, comma-separated, or `all`, or `default` which is the first module

get.summary: block data, {:block} can be set to `-1` to display mempool information

parameters.name: block
parameters.description: can be set to `-1` to display mempool information

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: data bits, comma-separated list of (`block`, `events`), at least one is required

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: module list, comma-separated, or `all`, or `default` which is the first module; exactly one module must be specified when paginating past the default page

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: paginates events; for blocks: `0`, `ℕ`, or `default` which is `0` (no offset limit); for mempool: `-0`, `-ℕ`, or `default` which is `-0` (max offset is 100k)

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: data bits, comma-separated list of (`transaction`, `events`), at least one is required

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: module list, comma-separated, or `all`, or `default` which is the first module; exactly one module must be specified when paginating past the default page; if module does not support transaction ids it is discarded

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: paginates events; `0`, `ℕ`, or `default` which is `0` (no offset limit)

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: data bits, comma-separated list of (`address`, `balances`, `events`, `mempool`), at least one is required

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: module list, comma-separated, or `all`, or `default` which is the first module; exactly one module must be specified when paginating past the default page

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: if paginating balances: `0`, `ℕ`, or `default` which is `0` (no offset limit); if paginating events or mempool: `0`, `ℕ`, `-0`, `-ℕ`, or `default` which is `-0` (max offset is 100k records); when paginating, `?from=` must contain exactly one of (`balances`, `events`, `mempool`) and may additionaly contain `address`

parameters.name: segment
parameters.description: date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format; shows events only for this date; when specified, `events` must be present in `?data=`, `mempool` must not be present in `?data=`; drops max offset constraint on `?page=`; exactly one module must be specified in `?from=` even for the default page

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: `all` for the full list, `latest` for the latest dump only, `stats` for the summary; `all` can't be used if `?from=` is `all` or lists more than one module

400.description: Bad request. User ID must be an integer and larger than 0.

401.description: Authorization information is missing or invalid.

events_24h.description: map where key is blockchain's module as string and value is number of events for past 24h as integer

mempool_events.description: map where key is blockchain's module as string and value is number of events in mempool as integer

block.description: block where this transaction is included in

sort_key.description: sorted key of this event in database

BlockModuleEvent.description: description of event for module in block

transaction.description: hash of transaction included in this block

address.description: hash of sender or recipient (depends on {effect} sign)

TransactionModuleEvent.description: description of event for module in transaction

address.description: hash of sender or recipient (depends on {effect} sign)

AddressModuleEvent.description: description of event for module in address

block.description: number of block where this event's transactions is included
